reason: Successfully executed all QA test steps - navigated to agent, verified idle status, sent mathematical question, received correct response containing "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Gamut app with sidebar containing two agents: QA-20260624-175333-hdlx and QA-20260624-175332-o6lk, both showing "idle" status.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260624-175332-o6lk" agent in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to the agent detail page at /agents/qa-20260624-175332-o6lk-n2c4oc.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" in the top right corner, meeting the requirement.
Clicked on the message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully entered in the textbox with placeholder "How can I help? Press cmd+enter to send".

Clicked the Send message button — Message sent successfully. Page navigated to session view (/agents/qa-20260624-175332-o6lk-n2c4oc/sessions/fc32cd36-442f-4953-8448-d7362490b4e2), session named "Math Question About Addition", agent status changed to "working".
Waited for response — Response received in 2 seconds (well within the 3-minute timeout). Agent status returned to "idle" indicating processing complete.

Verified response mentions "4" — Response clearly displays "4" as a prominent centered message with "Worked for 2s" below it, confirming correct mathematical answer. User message "Hello! What is 2+2?" visible in chat bubble at top right.
